TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tapowaray,_Saranawan, title = Tapowaray,_Saranawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tapowaray,_Saranawan} }

S.FORM: == Tapowaray, Saranawan == Itiniay i ka'amis no Kakacawan (Changbin Siang, 長濱鄉) no Posing (Taitung Sian, 台東縣) ko Tapowaray a niyaro'. Ka'amis no Tapowaray i, o Cifotingay a 'alo ato Loham . Katimol i, o Sadipongan a niyaro' . Mipasi'ayaway to riyar ko kamalo' no Tapowaray. Aenem ko tata'angay a 'alo no Tapowaray, o roma sato o ci^ci'. Nani'amis, o Sinkian, o Ritecay, o Pakacanan, o Pakongkongan, o Ma'oraway, ato o Cifongoray. Tamdaw no niyaro' Polong i 124 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', maala 250 ko tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 89%, roma 4%. Rayray no Niyaro' O "Saranawan" han no mato'asay a mipangangan to nini a niyaro', o naitiya:ayho a ngangan koni. Awaay to ko fana' no aniniay a tamdaw ko piala tora Saranawan hananay. O sowal i tilid ato no mato'asay i, micomocomod tayni i Saranawan ko mafolaway a ngasangasawan. Mikilim to kasafangcal no 'orip. Na i Patorongan, i Fakong, i Makotaay, i Dafdaf, ato i cowacowa a niyaro' no Kalingko. I a'ayaw, malaklak i tatihi no Ritecay ko pipatileng to loma'. Nawhani, ma peleng no lonen ko omah ato loma' no filawnlan. Miliyaw haca a mafolaw ko roma a finawlan tayra i Koladot (i ka'amis no Cifotingay) ato i Pisirian. Awato ko malo'ay i nalacolan no Saranawan. Ira:ho ko "Naniyaro'an" hananay a ngangan no pala i tatihi no Ritecay i fafaed. O pipatirengan to loloma' no niyaro' iti:yaho. Roma a finawlan i, malinah tayra i timol, tatihi no Pakongkongan ato Ma'oraway, miliyaw a patileng to faelohay a kamalo'an. O "Naloma'an" han no mato'asay a pangangan tora pala no faelohay a katelian. O Saranawan iho ko ngangan no niyaro' itiya. O mako^koay no Dipong na i Naloma'an tayra to i aniniay a kamalo'an. Ta o "Tapowaray" to tadangangan no malokelonay a niyaro'. O rayray nora ngangan no "Tapowaray", o kapowar no nemnem noya 'alo (Ritecay). Caayay ko karayas/kaenar nora dafdaf ko kacinganngan no Tapowaray. Moraraw ko pitilid no Taywan i codacodaan ko kaira nora ngangan. Yo caayho ka palokelon no Dipong tayni i kamalo'an anini, o "Cisielacay" han no 'alomanay a mipangang tora pala. Adihay ko masamaanay a sielac i tatihi no riyar. Caay ka fangcal a misaomah, adihay tato ko sielac ato fokeloh. I 'ayaw, 'aloman ko mipodpoday to kohecalay a sielac no Tapowaray a mipacakay. Anini sato, maleneng to no riyar ko sawali:ay a hekal, caay to ka hakowa ko sielac a ma'araw. I tiyaho, mipanay ato malingad ko mato'asay, tay:ra i Ritecay a miladom to kietecay a nanom. O samafana'ay a minanom i, no i tadalaenoay ato i fafaeday noya to'el ko tatodongay saan. Aedengan, taka:raw tato ko kaci'apol no nanom no Ritecay, caay ka fangcal a mararid a nanomen, makali'ang ko fowa' ato cefo. Lisin no niyaro' Ilisin Malopon ko tayar no malingaday i kacihelangan, mi salisin ko niyaro' a mapolong. 'Adihay ko tayal i piilisinan a romi'ad. Misacepo' I 'ayaw no pikakahongan a romi'ad, misacepo' ko fa'inayan no niyaro' i riyar. Pakacidal O sowal no mato'asay i, ano mararid sa ma'orad ko romi'ad, masa'opo ko niyaro' a mamipakacidal. Ira ko sakero, radiw, pitolon no 'alomanay i talo'an. Misanga' to nisapangaan a kilang, o hahawikiden a tayra i lotok. Ira ko lalan tora lotok na i fafaed no Sadipongan. Maratar a lomowad ko kapakapah (tolo ko toki no matiniay a to'ek ), miliyas to pikalat no cidal. Tayra to i lotok, mitolon to kawas no cidal (cilocidal a kawas?), mipatireng tora nisapangaan a kilang tora lotok, haw mapakalemed ni cilocidal a kawas ko niyaro' no mipakacidalay. Herek sato, tayra ho i taro'an no niyaro' a milepon tora lisin. Ikor sato, miliyaw ho a misanga' to faelohay a nisapangaan a kilang to sapipakacidal. Caay ka pipatedo saan mikilim to masamaanay a kilang ko sapisanga' tora panga (o masamaanay a kilang?). O ya katelangay a nisapangaan, todohen ano misafaeloh toya lisin, ato i lisin no pipaka'orad. Paka'orad Ano mararid a tata'ang ko cidal, eca ka 'orad, makerah to 'alo (eca ka kerah ko 'alo no Ritecay), eca ka edeng ko nanom to sapipaloma, sapipadateng, sapisa'ayam, sapisafafoy i, misa'opo ko 'alomanay a misatapang to lisin no sapipaka'orad i taro'an. Ira ko kero, radiw ato lisin. Maherek to i, tayra ho ko kapah no niyaro' toya pipakacidalan a lotok, mitolon to kawas no mipa'oraday. Malokelon sato na i lotok, tayra i 'alo no Ma'oraway, misakero, romadiw, mitodoh toya sa'ayaway a nisapangaan a kilang i pipakacidalan ho. Mitala ko roma a tamdaw no niyaro' i 'alo, mapolong a misalisin. Ngasaw no niyaro' Pacidal :'Aloman ko nai Makotaay. Cikatopay: Ciwidian: O nani Ciwidiaanay. Monali: Malolang: O Pi'edoan han no roma a finawlan. Radiw no niyaro' «Radiw no Tapowaray (Saranawan)» Misi'ayaw to riyar o paniyaro'an niyam . Kaetip, o lotok pidongecan. Kawali, o riyar pifotingan say no kapah. Fangcal, fangcalay kopaniyaro'an no Tapowaray (Saranawan). O kahemekan no tayniay. Cecay ko 'awas matahafikod no kakahong i Tapowaray (Saranawan). I-yo-in-hay-yan-na-i-ya-yan, hoy-yan-no-i-yo-yin, hoy-ya-yan-hay-yo-yin, o-hi-ya-hoy-yan. Selal No i tiyaayho a selal ko mitilidan i laeno. Malitengay: Mato'asay. Mama no kapah: Mamikimad, mipapro to tayar. Cipo'otay: O mipacokay to fafoy, mitokaday o titi. Malacacaway: O mitefocay. Mikelid to safa a selal. Malakapahay: (Hakeno, cima ko mitongal?) Pakarongay: I piilisinan, miala to dotong hananay a kilang, o safangcalay a matodoh a kilang. Tosa a raya' ko cecay a tamaw. Ano mimaan ko loma', militemoh, miradom, mipananom to mato'asay. Mi'afatay: Misoped to 'afat (ma'icangay a 'aor), 'acam, ato maamaanay a sapitodoh to kilang. Mipaedil to talo'an no niyaro'. Miasikay: O sakaemangay a wawa. Mamiasik to lawac ato lalan no niyaro'. Anini sato, masapafaeloh ko ngangan no selaselal, mikapoto ko fafahiyan i selaselalan. Lima a miheca ko cecay tatodongan a selal. Tayal no Niyaro' tayal i riyar dadangoyan O sapifoting i riyar ko dadangoyan. I tiyaho, kaaway ho no soka , a cidadangoyangoyan ko finawlan no niyaro'. Miala ko 'aol i lotok, kelacen ko ca'ang ato podac no 'aol, tenoren i nanom, ta faloden to keliw no 'oway. Matatodong sa cecay (ano tosa to?) a tamdaw tomireng i fafaed. O ceray no kamoraw ko sapisakadot (kadot, 槳). Mocelay, kakaya'ay ko matiniay a ceray, fangcal a malasakadot no dadangoyan. Edengan to o Saranawan a niyaro' ko ci dadangoyanay, malaliday a mifoting tayra i wali i Kakacawan anini. Roma Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko simaysiw i niyaro'. Tolo ko kiwkay a mapatileng, o 天主教, 基督教, ato 真耶穌教. 'Aloman ko mipasingliay. Malignad, mifoting, mitama', misiyakay ko 'orip no finawlan no Tapowaray. O mafana'ay a misanga' to tamina ko fa'inayan no Tapowaray. Ci taminamina ko 'alomanay i tiyaho. Iraho ko cisapaday a timina a fa'inayan anini. O samafana:'ay a mifoting, mitoor to kakohong ato maamaanay a foting. Mafana' haca a micelem, mipacing, micekiw, ato mi'aowang. Misakosoy ko mato'asay i lotolotok no Tapowaray. Cietan i 'ayaw ko misakosoyay. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: == tapo~uwaraj, saranawan == itiniaj i kaʡamis no~u kakaʦawan (ʦħaŋb~b~vin siaŋ, ***) no~u po~usiŋ (taito~u~uŋ sian, ***) ko~u tapo~uwaraj a nijaro~uʡ. kaʡamis no~u tapo~uwaraj i, o~u ʦifo~utiŋaj a ʡaɾo~u ato~u ɾo~uħam . katimo~uɾ i, o~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ . mipasiʡajawaj to~u rijar ko~u kamaɾo~uʡ no~u tapo~uwaraj. aənəm ko~u tataʡaŋaj a ʡaɾo~u no~u tapo~uwaraj, o~u ro~uma sato~u o~u ʦiʔʦiʡ. naniʡamis, o~u sinkian, o~u ritəʦaj, o~u pakaʦanan, o~u pako~uŋko~uŋan, o~u maʡo~urawaj, ato~u o~u ʦifo~uŋo~uraj. tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ po~uɾo~uŋ i *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, maaɾa *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, ro~uma *%. rajraj no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u "saranawan" ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj a mipaŋaŋan to~u nini a nijaro~uʡ, o~u naitija:ajħo~u a ŋaŋan ko~uni. awaaj to~u ko~u fanaʡ no~u aniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piaɾa to~ura saranawan ħananaj. o~u so~uwaɾ i tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u no~u mato~uʡasaj i, miʦo~umo~uʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i saranawan ko~u mafo~uɾawaj a ŋasaŋasawan. mikiɾim to~u kasafaŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip. na i pato~uro~uŋan, i fako~uŋ, i mako~utaaj, i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf, ato~u i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a nijaro~uʡ no~u kaɾiŋko~u. i aʡajaw, maɾakɾak i tatiħi no~u ritəʦaj ko~u pipatiɾəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ. nawħani, ma pəɾəŋ no~u ɾo~unən ko~u o~umaħ ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u fiɾawnɾan. miɾijaw ħaʦa a mafo~uɾaw ko~u ro~uma a finawɾan tajra i ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut (i kaʡamis no~u ʦifo~utiŋaj) ato~u i pisirian. awato~u ko~u maɾo~uʡaj i naɾaʦo~uɾan no~u saranawan. ira:ħo~u ko~u "nanijaro~uʡan" ħananaj a ŋaŋan no~u paɾa i tatiħi no~u ritəʦaj i fafaəɬ~ɮ. o~u pipatirəŋan to~u ɾo~uɾo~umaʡ no~u nijaro~uʡ iti:jaħo~u. ro~uma a finawɾan i, maɾinaħ tajra i timo~uɾ, tatiħi no~u pako~uŋko~uŋan ato~u maʡo~urawaj, miɾijaw a patiɾəŋ to~u faəɾo~uħaj a kamaɾo~uʡan. o~u "naɾo~umaʡan" ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj a paŋaŋan to~ura paɾa no~u faəɾo~uħaj a katəɾian. o~u saranawan iħo~u ko~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ itija. o~u mako~uʔko~uaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ na i naɾo~umaʡan tajra to~u i aniniaj a kamaɾo~uʡan. ta o~u "tapo~uwaraj" to~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan no~u maɾo~ukəɾo~unaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u rajraj no~ura ŋaŋan no~u "tapo~uwaraj", o~u kapo~uwar no~u nəmnəm no~uja ʡaɾo~u (ritəʦaj). ʦaajaj ko~u karajas/kaənar no~ura ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u kaʦiŋanŋan no~u tapo~uwaraj. mo~uraraw ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan i ʦo~uɬ~ɮaʦo~uɬ~ɮaan ko~u kaira no~ura ŋaŋan. jo~u ʦaajħo~u ka paɾo~ukəɾo~un no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tajni i kamaɾo~uʡan anini, o~u "ʦisiəɾaʦaj" ħan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a mipaŋaŋ to~ura paɾa. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamaanaj a siəɾaʦ i tatiħi no~u rijar. ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a misao~umaħ, aɬ~ɮiħaj tato~u ko~u siəɾaʦ ato~u fo~ukəɾo~uħ. i ʡajaw, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj a siəɾaʦ no~u tapo~uwaraj a mipaʦakaj. anini sato~u, maɾənəŋ to~u no~u rijar ko~u sawaɾi:aj a ħəkaɾ, ʦaaj to~u ka ħako~uwa ko~u siəɾaʦ a maʡaraw. i tijaħo~u, mipanaj ato~u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u mato~uʡasaj, taj:ra i ritəʦaj a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um to~u kiətəʦaj a nano~um. o~u samafanaʡaj a minano~um i, no~u i taɬ~ɮaɾaəno~uaj ato~u i fafaəɬ~ɮaj no~uja to~uʡəɾ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saan. aəɬ~ɮəŋan, taka:raw tato~u ko~u kaʦiʡapo~uɾ no~u nano~um no~u ritəʦaj, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a marariɬ~ɮ a nano~umən, makaɾiʡaŋ ko~u fo~uwaʡ ato~u ʦəfo~u. ɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ iɾisin maɾo~upo~un ko~u tajar no~u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i kaʦiħəɾaŋan, mi saɾisin ko~u nijaro~uʡ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ. ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tajaɾ i piiɾisinan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. misaʦəpo~uʡ i ʡajaw no~u pikakaħo~uŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misaʦəpo~uʡ ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ i rijar. pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj i, ano~u marariɬ~ɮ sa maʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, masaʡo~upo~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ a mamipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. ira ko~u sakəro~u, raɬ~ɮiw, pito~uɾo~un no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i taɾo~uʡan. misaŋaʡ to~u nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ, o~u ħaħawikiɬ~ɮən a tajra i ɾo~uto~uk. ira ko~u ɾaɾan to~ura ɾo~uto~uk na i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan. maratar a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kapakapaħ (to~uɾo~u ko~u to~uki no~u matiniaj a to~uʡək ), miɾijas to~u pikaɾat no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. tajra to~u i ɾo~uto~uk, mito~uɾo~un to~u kawas no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ (ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawas?), mipatirəŋ to~ura nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ to~ura ɾo~uto~uk, ħaw mapakaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawas ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u mipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾaj. ħərək sato~u, tajra ħo~u i taro~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ a miɾəpo~un to~ura ɾisin. iko~ur sato~u, miɾijaw ħo~u a misaŋaʡ to~u faəɾo~uħaj a nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ to~u sapipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. ʦaaj ka pipatəɬ~ɮo~u saan mikiɾim to~u masamaanaj a kiɾaŋ ko~u sapisaŋaʡ to~ura paŋa (o~u masamaanaj a kiɾaŋ?). o~u ja katəɾaŋaj a nisapaŋaan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ano~u misafaəɾo~uħ to~uja ɾisin, ato~u i ɾisin no~u pipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ. pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ano~u marariɬ~ɮ a tataʡaŋ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, əʦa ka ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, makəraħ to~u ʡaɾo~u (əʦa ka kəraħ ko~u ʡaɾo~u no~u ritəʦaj), əʦa ka əɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u nano~um to~u sapipaɾo~uma, sapipaɬ~ɮatəŋ, sapisaʡajam, sapisafafo~uj i, misaʡo~upo~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a misatapaŋ to~u ɾisin no~u sapipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ i taro~uʡan. ira ko~u kəro~u, raɬ~ɮiw ato~u ɾisin. maħərək to~u i, tajra ħo~u ko~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ to~uja pipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan a ɾo~uto~uk, mito~uɾo~un to~u kawas no~u mipaʡo~uraɬ~ɮaj. maɾo~ukəɾo~un sato~u na i ɾo~uto~uk, tajra i ʡaɾo~u no~u maʡo~urawaj, misakəro~u, ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~uja saʡajawaj a nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ i pipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan ħo~u. mitaɾa ko~u ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ i ʡaɾo~u, mapo~uɾo~uŋ a misaɾisin. ŋasaw no~u nijaro~uʡ paʦiɬ~ɮaɾ :ʡaɾo~uman ko~u nai mako~utaaj. ʦikato~upaj: ʦiwiɬ~ɮian: o~u nani ʦiwiɬ~ɮiaanaj. mo~unaɾi: maɾo~uɾaŋ: o~u piʡəɬ~ɮo~uan ħan no~u ro~uma a finawɾan. raɬ~ɮiw no~u nijaro~uʡ *raɬ~ɮiw no~u tapo~uwaraj (saranawan)* misiʡajaw to~u rijar o~u panijaro~uʡan nijam . kaətip, o~u ɾo~uto~uk piɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦan. kawaɾi, o~u rijar pifo~utiŋan saj no~u kapaħ. faŋʦaɾ, faŋʦaɾaj ko~upanijaro~uʡan no~u tapo~uwaraj (saranawan). o~u kaħəməkan no~u tajniaj. ʦəʦaj ko~u ʡawas mataħafiko~uɬ~ɮ no~u kakaħo~uŋ i tapo~uwaraj (saranawan). i-jo~u-in-ħaj-jan-na-i-ja-jan, ħo~uj-jan-no~u-i-jo~u-jin, ħo~uj-ja-jan-ħaj-jo~u-jin, o~u-ħi-ja-ħo~uj-jan. səɾaɾ no~u i tijaajħo~u a səɾaɾ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮan i ɾaəno~u. maɾitəŋaj: mato~uʡasaj. mama no~u kapaħ: mamikimaɬ~ɮ, mipapro~u to~u tajar. ʦipo~uʡo~utaj: o~u mipaʦo~ukaj to~u fafo~uj, mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj o~u titi. maɾaʦaʦawaj: o~u mitəfo~uʦaj. mikəɾiɬ~ɮ to~u safa a səɾaɾ. maɾakapaħaj: (ħakəno~u, ʦima ko~u mito~uŋaɾ?) pakaro~uŋaj: i piiɾisinan, miaɾa to~u ɬ~ɮo~uto~uŋ ħananaj a kiɾaŋ, o~u safaŋʦaɾaj a mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ a kiɾaŋ. to~usa a rajaʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamaw. ano~u mimaan ko~u ɾo~umaʡ, miɾitəmo~uħ, miraɬ~ɮo~um, mipanano~um to~u mato~uʡasaj. miʡafataj: miso~upəɬ~ɮ to~u ʡafat (maʡiʦaŋaj a ʡao~ur), ʡaʦam, ato~u maamaanaj a sapito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~u kiɾaŋ. mipaəɬ~ɮiɾ to~u taɾo~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. miasikaj: o~u sakaəmaŋaj a wawa. mamiasik to~u ɾawaʦ ato~u ɾaɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. anini sato~u, masapafaəɾo~uħ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u səɾasəɾaɾ, mikapo~uto~u ko~u fafaħijan i səɾasəɾaɾan. ɾima a miħəʦa ko~u ʦəʦaj tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a səɾaɾ. tajaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ tajaɾ i rijar ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan o~u sapifo~utiŋ i rijar ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan. i tijaħo~u, kaawaj ħo~u no~u so~uka , a ʦiɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujaŋo~ujan ko~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. miaɾa ko~u ʡao~uɾ i ɾo~uto~uk, kəɾaʦən ko~u ʦaʡaŋ ato~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ no~u ʡao~uɾ, təno~urən i nano~um, ta faɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u kəɾiw no~u ʡo~uwaj. matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ʦəʦaj (ano~u to~usa to~u?) a tamɬ~ɮaw to~umirəŋ i fafaəɬ~ɮ. o~u ʦəraj no~u kamo~uraw ko~u sapisakaɬ~ɮo~ut (kaɬ~ɮo~ut, *). mo~uʦəɾaj, kakajaʡaj ko~u matiniaj a ʦəraj, faŋʦaɾ a maɾasakaɬ~ɮo~ut no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan. əɬ~ɮəŋan to~u o~u saranawan a nijaro~uʡ ko~u ʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujanaj, maɾaɾiɬ~ɮaj a mifo~utiŋ tajra i waɾi i kakaʦawan anini. ro~uma ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u simajsiw i nijaro~uʡ. to~uɾo~u ko~u kiwkaj a mapatiɾəŋ, o~u ***, ***, ato~u ****. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipasiŋɾiaj. maɾi*naɬ~ɮ, mifo~utiŋ, mitamaʡ, misijakaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawɾan no~u tapo~uwaraj. o~u mafanaʡaj a misaŋaʡ to~u tamina ko~u faʡinajan no~u tapo~uwaraj. ʦi taminamina ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i tijaħo~u. iraħo~u ko~u ʦisapaɬ~ɮaj a timina a faʡinajan anini. o~u samafana:ʡaj a mifo~utiŋ, mito~uo~ur to~u kako~uħo~uŋ ato~u maamaanaj a fo~utiŋ. mafanaʡ ħaʦa a miʦəɾəm, mipaʦiŋ, miʦəkiw, ato~u miʡao~uwaŋ. misako~uso~uj ko~u mato~uʡasaj i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~uk no~u tapo~uwaraj. ʦiətan i ʡajaw ko~u misako~uso~ujaj. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: == Tapowaray, Saranawan == Itiniay i ka'amis no Kakacawan (Changbin Siang, 長濱鄉) no Posing (Taitung Sian, 台東縣) ko Tapowaray a niyaro'. Ka'amis no Tapowaray i, o Cifotingay a 'alo ato Loham . Katimol i, o Sadipongan a niyaro' . Mipasi'ayaway to riyar ko kamalo' no Tapowaray. Aenem ko tata'angay a 'alo no Tapowaray, o roma sato o ci^ci'. Nani'amis, o Sinkian, o Ritecay, o Pakacanan, o Pakongkongan, o Ma'oraway, ato o Cifongoray. Tamdaw no niyaro' Polong i 124 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', maala 250 ko tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 89%, roma 4%. Rayray no Niyaro' O "Saranawan" han no mato'asay a mipangangan to nini a niyaro', o naitiya:ayho a ngangan koni. Awaay to ko fana' no aniniay a tamdaw ko piala tora Saranawan hananay. O sowal i tilid ato no mato'asay i, micomocomod tayni i Saranawan ko mafolaway a ngasangasawan. Mikilim to kasafangcal no 'orip. Na i Patorongan, i Fakong, i Makotaay, i Dafdaf, ato i cowacowa a niyaro' no Kalingko. I a'ayaw, malaklak i tatihi no Ritecay ko pipatileng to loma'. Nawhani, ma peleng no lonen ko omah ato loma' no filawnlan. Miliyaw haca a mafolaw ko roma a finawlan tayra i Koladot (i ka'amis no Cifotingay) ato i Pisirian. Awato ko malo'ay i nalacolan no Saranawan. Ira:ho ko "Naniyaro'an" hananay a ngangan no pala i tatihi no Ritecay i fafaed. O pipatirengan to loloma' no niyaro' iti:yaho. Roma a finawlan i, malinah tayra i timol, tatihi no Pakongkongan ato Ma'oraway, miliyaw a patileng to faelohay a kamalo'an. O "Naloma'an" han no mato'asay a pangangan tora pala no faelohay a katelian. O Saranawan iho ko ngangan no niyaro' itiya. O mako^koay no Dipong na i Naloma'an tayra to i aniniay a kamalo'an. Ta o "Tapowaray" to tadangangan no malokelonay a niyaro'. O rayray nora ngangan no "Tapowaray", o kapowar no nemnem noya 'alo (Ritecay). Caayay ko karayas/kaenar nora dafdaf ko kacinganngan no Tapowaray. Moraraw ko pitilid no Taywan i codacodaan ko kaira nora ngangan. Yo caayho ka palokelon no Dipong tayni i kamalo'an anini, o "Cisielacay" han no 'alomanay a mipangang tora pala. Adihay ko masamaanay a sielac i tatihi no riyar. Caay ka fangcal a misaomah, adihay tato ko sielac ato fokeloh. I 'ayaw, 'aloman ko mipodpoday to kohecalay a sielac no Tapowaray a mipacakay. Anini sato, maleneng to no riyar ko sawali:ay a hekal, caay to ka hakowa ko sielac a ma'araw. I tiyaho, mipanay ato malingad ko mato'asay, tay:ra i Ritecay a miladom to kietecay a nanom. O samafana'ay a minanom i, no i tadalaenoay ato i fafaeday noya to'el ko tatodongay saan. Aedengan, taka:raw tato ko kaci'apol no nanom no Ritecay, caay ka fangcal a mararid a nanomen, makali'ang ko fowa' ato cefo. Lisin no niyaro' Ilisin Malopon ko tayar no malingaday i kacihelangan, mi salisin ko niyaro' a mapolong. 'Adihay ko tayal i piilisinan a romi'ad. Misacepo' I 'ayaw no pikakahongan a romi'ad, misacepo' ko fa'inayan no niyaro' i riyar. Pakacidal O sowal no mato'asay i, ano mararid sa ma'orad ko romi'ad, masa'opo ko niyaro' a mamipakacidal. Ira ko sakero, radiw, pitolon no 'alomanay i talo'an. Misanga' to nisapangaan a kilang, o hahawikiden a tayra i lotok. Ira ko lalan tora lotok na i fafaed no Sadipongan. Maratar a lomowad ko kapakapah (tolo ko toki no matiniay a to'ek ), miliyas to pikalat no cidal. Tayra to i lotok, mitolon to kawas no cidal (cilocidal a kawas?), mipatireng tora nisapangaan a kilang tora lotok, haw mapakalemed ni cilocidal a kawas ko niyaro' no mipakacidalay. Herek sato, tayra ho i taro'an no niyaro' a milepon tora lisin. Ikor sato, miliyaw ho a misanga' to faelohay a nisapangaan a kilang to sapipakacidal. Caay ka pipatedo saan mikilim to masamaanay a kilang ko sapisanga' tora panga (o masamaanay a kilang?). O ya katelangay a nisapangaan, todohen ano misafaeloh toya lisin, ato i lisin no pipaka'orad. Paka'orad Ano mararid a tata'ang ko cidal, eca ka 'orad, makerah to 'alo (eca ka kerah ko 'alo no Ritecay), eca ka edeng ko nanom to sapipaloma, sapipadateng, sapisa'ayam, sapisafafoy i, misa'opo ko 'alomanay a misatapang to lisin no sapipaka'orad i taro'an. Ira ko kero, radiw ato lisin. Maherek to i, tayra ho ko kapah no niyaro' toya pipakacidalan a lotok, mitolon to kawas no mipa'oraday. Malokelon sato na i lotok, tayra i 'alo no Ma'oraway, misakero, romadiw, mitodoh toya sa'ayaway a nisapangaan a kilang i pipakacidalan ho. Mitala ko roma a tamdaw no niyaro' i 'alo, mapolong a misalisin. Ngasaw no niyaro' Pacidal :'Aloman ko nai Makotaay. Cikatopay: Ciwidian: O nani Ciwidiaanay. Monali: Malolang: O Pi'edoan han no roma a finawlan. Radiw no niyaro' «Radiw no Tapowaray (Saranawan)» Misi'ayaw to riyar o paniyaro'an niyam . Kaetip, o lotok pidongecan. Kawali, o riyar pifotingan say no kapah. Fangcal, fangcalay kopaniyaro'an no Tapowaray (Saranawan). O kahemekan no tayniay. Cecay ko 'awas matahafikod no kakahong i Tapowaray (Saranawan). I-yo-in-hay-yan-na-i-ya-yan, hoy-yan-no-i-yo-yin, hoy-ya-yan-hay-yo-yin, o-hi-ya-hoy-yan. Selal No i tiyaayho a selal ko mitilidan i laeno. Malitengay: Mato'asay. Mama no kapah: Mamikimad, mipapro to tayar. Cipo'otay: O mipacokay to fafoy, mitokaday o titi. Malacacaway: O mitefocay. Mikelid to safa a selal. Malakapahay: (Hakeno, cima ko mitongal?) Pakarongay: I piilisinan, miala to dotong hananay a kilang, o safangcalay a matodoh a kilang. Tosa a raya' ko cecay a tamaw. Ano mimaan ko loma', militemoh, miradom, mipananom to mato'asay. Mi'afatay: Misoped to 'afat (ma'icangay a 'aor), 'acam, ato maamaanay a sapitodoh to kilang. Mipaedil to talo'an no niyaro'. Miasikay: O sakaemangay a wawa. Mamiasik to lawac ato lalan no niyaro'. Anini sato, masapafaeloh ko ngangan no selaselal, mikapoto ko fafahiyan i selaselalan. Lima a miheca ko cecay tatodongan a selal. Tayal no Niyaro' tayal i riyar dadangoyan O sapifoting i riyar ko dadangoyan. I tiyaho, kaaway ho no soka , a cidadangoyangoyan ko finawlan no niyaro'. Miala ko 'aol i lotok, kelacen ko ca'ang ato podac no 'aol, tenoren i nanom, ta faloden to keliw no 'oway. Matatodong sa cecay (ano tosa to?) a tamdaw tomireng i fafaed. O ceray no kamoraw ko sapisakadot (kadot, 槳). Mocelay, kakaya'ay ko matiniay a ceray, fangcal a malasakadot no dadangoyan. Edengan to o Saranawan a niyaro' ko ci dadangoyanay, malaliday a mifoting tayra i wali i Kakacawan anini. Roma Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko simaysiw i niyaro'. Tolo ko kiwkay a mapatileng, o 天主教, 基督教, ato 真耶穌教. 'Aloman ko mipasingliay. Malignad, mifoting, mitama', misiyakay ko 'orip no finawlan no Tapowaray. O mafana'ay a misanga' to tamina ko fa'inayan no Tapowaray. Ci taminamina ko 'alomanay i tiyaho. Iraho ko cisapaday a timina a fa'inayan anini. O samafana:'ay a mifoting, mitoor to kakohong ato maamaanay a foting. Mafana' haca a micelem, mipacing, micekiw, ato mi'aowang. Misakosoy ko mato'asay i lotolotok no Tapowaray. Cietan i 'ayaw ko misakosoyay. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: == tapo~uwaraj, saranawan == itiniaj i kaʡamis no~u kakaʦawan (ʦħaŋb~b~vin siaŋ, ***) no~u po~usiŋ (taito~u~uŋ sian, ***) ko~u tapo~uwaraj a nijaro~uʡ. kaʡamis no~u tapo~uwaraj i, o~u ʦifo~utiŋaj a ʡaɾo~u ato~u ɾo~uħam . katimo~uɾ i, o~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ . mipasiʡajawaj to~u rijar ko~u kamaɾo~uʡ no~u tapo~uwaraj. aənəm ko~u tataʡaŋaj a ʡaɾo~u no~u tapo~uwaraj, o~u ro~uma sato~u o~u ʦiʔʦiʡ. naniʡamis, o~u sinkian, o~u ritəʦaj, o~u pakaʦanan, o~u pako~uŋko~uŋan, o~u maʡo~urawaj, ato~u o~u ʦifo~uŋo~uraj. tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ po~uɾo~uŋ i *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, maaɾa *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, ro~uma *%. rajraj no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u "saranawan" ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj a mipaŋaŋan to~u nini a nijaro~uʡ, o~u naitija:ajħo~u a ŋaŋan ko~uni. awaaj to~u ko~u fanaʡ no~u aniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piaɾa to~ura saranawan ħananaj. o~u so~uwaɾ i tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u no~u mato~uʡasaj i, miʦo~umo~uʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i saranawan ko~u mafo~uɾawaj a ŋasaŋasawan. mikiɾim to~u kasafaŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip. na i pato~uro~uŋan, i fako~uŋ, i mako~utaaj, i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf, ato~u i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a nijaro~uʡ no~u kaɾiŋko~u. i aʡajaw, maɾakɾak i tatiħi no~u ritəʦaj ko~u pipatiɾəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ. nawħani, ma pəɾəŋ no~u ɾo~unən ko~u o~umaħ ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u fiɾawnɾan. miɾijaw ħaʦa a mafo~uɾaw ko~u ro~uma a finawɾan tajra i ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut (i kaʡamis no~u ʦifo~utiŋaj) ato~u i pisirian. awato~u ko~u maɾo~uʡaj i naɾaʦo~uɾan no~u saranawan. ira:ħo~u ko~u "nanijaro~uʡan" ħananaj a ŋaŋan no~u paɾa i tatiħi no~u ritəʦaj i fafaəɬ~ɮ. o~u pipatirəŋan to~u ɾo~uɾo~umaʡ no~u nijaro~uʡ iti:jaħo~u. ro~uma a finawɾan i, maɾinaħ tajra i timo~uɾ, tatiħi no~u pako~uŋko~uŋan ato~u maʡo~urawaj, miɾijaw a patiɾəŋ to~u faəɾo~uħaj a kamaɾo~uʡan. o~u "naɾo~umaʡan" ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj a paŋaŋan to~ura paɾa no~u faəɾo~uħaj a katəɾian. o~u saranawan iħo~u ko~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ itija. o~u mako~uʔko~uaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ na i naɾo~umaʡan tajra to~u i aniniaj a kamaɾo~uʡan. ta o~u "tapo~uwaraj" to~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan no~u maɾo~ukəɾo~unaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u rajraj no~ura ŋaŋan no~u "tapo~uwaraj", o~u kapo~uwar no~u nəmnəm no~uja ʡaɾo~u (ritəʦaj). ʦaajaj ko~u karajas/kaənar no~ura ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u kaʦiŋanŋan no~u tapo~uwaraj. mo~uraraw ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan i ʦo~uɬ~ɮaʦo~uɬ~ɮaan ko~u kaira no~ura ŋaŋan. jo~u ʦaajħo~u ka paɾo~ukəɾo~un no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tajni i kamaɾo~uʡan anini, o~u "ʦisiəɾaʦaj" ħan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a mipaŋaŋ to~ura paɾa. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamaanaj a siəɾaʦ i tatiħi no~u rijar. ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a misao~umaħ, aɬ~ɮiħaj tato~u ko~u siəɾaʦ ato~u fo~ukəɾo~uħ. i ʡajaw, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj a siəɾaʦ no~u tapo~uwaraj a mipaʦakaj. anini sato~u, maɾənəŋ to~u no~u rijar ko~u sawaɾi:aj a ħəkaɾ, ʦaaj to~u ka ħako~uwa ko~u siəɾaʦ a maʡaraw. i tijaħo~u, mipanaj ato~u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u mato~uʡasaj, taj:ra i ritəʦaj a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um to~u kiətəʦaj a nano~um. o~u samafanaʡaj a minano~um i, no~u i taɬ~ɮaɾaəno~uaj ato~u i fafaəɬ~ɮaj no~uja to~uʡəɾ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saan. aəɬ~ɮəŋan, taka:raw tato~u ko~u kaʦiʡapo~uɾ no~u nano~um no~u ritəʦaj, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a marariɬ~ɮ a nano~umən, makaɾiʡaŋ ko~u fo~uwaʡ ato~u ʦəfo~u. ɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ iɾisin maɾo~upo~un ko~u tajar no~u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i kaʦiħəɾaŋan, mi saɾisin ko~u nijaro~uʡ a mapo~uɾo~uŋ. ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tajaɾ i piiɾisinan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. misaʦəpo~uʡ i ʡajaw no~u pikakaħo~uŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misaʦəpo~uʡ ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ i rijar. pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj i, ano~u marariɬ~ɮ sa maʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, masaʡo~upo~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ a mamipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. ira ko~u sakəro~u, raɬ~ɮiw, pito~uɾo~un no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i taɾo~uʡan. misaŋaʡ to~u nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ, o~u ħaħawikiɬ~ɮən a tajra i ɾo~uto~uk. ira ko~u ɾaɾan to~ura ɾo~uto~uk na i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan. maratar a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kapakapaħ (to~uɾo~u ko~u to~uki no~u matiniaj a to~uʡək ), miɾijas to~u pikaɾat no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. tajra to~u i ɾo~uto~uk, mito~uɾo~un to~u kawas no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ (ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawas?), mipatirəŋ to~ura nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ to~ura ɾo~uto~uk, ħaw mapakaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawas ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u mipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾaj. ħərək sato~u, tajra ħo~u i taro~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ a miɾəpo~un to~ura ɾisin. iko~ur sato~u, miɾijaw ħo~u a misaŋaʡ to~u faəɾo~uħaj a nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ to~u sapipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. ʦaaj ka pipatəɬ~ɮo~u saan mikiɾim to~u masamaanaj a kiɾaŋ ko~u sapisaŋaʡ to~ura paŋa (o~u masamaanaj a kiɾaŋ?). o~u ja katəɾaŋaj a nisapaŋaan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ano~u misafaəɾo~uħ to~uja ɾisin, ato~u i ɾisin no~u pipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ. pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ano~u marariɬ~ɮ a tataʡaŋ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, əʦa ka ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, makəraħ to~u ʡaɾo~u (əʦa ka kəraħ ko~u ʡaɾo~u no~u ritəʦaj), əʦa ka əɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u nano~um to~u sapipaɾo~uma, sapipaɬ~ɮatəŋ, sapisaʡajam, sapisafafo~uj i, misaʡo~upo~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a misatapaŋ to~u ɾisin no~u sapipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ i taro~uʡan. ira ko~u kəro~u, raɬ~ɮiw ato~u ɾisin. maħərək to~u i, tajra ħo~u ko~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ to~uja pipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan a ɾo~uto~uk, mito~uɾo~un to~u kawas no~u mipaʡo~uraɬ~ɮaj. maɾo~ukəɾo~un sato~u na i ɾo~uto~uk, tajra i ʡaɾo~u no~u maʡo~urawaj, misakəro~u, ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~uja saʡajawaj a nisapaŋaan a kiɾaŋ i pipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan ħo~u. mitaɾa ko~u ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ i ʡaɾo~u, mapo~uɾo~uŋ a misaɾisin. ŋasaw no~u nijaro~uʡ paʦiɬ~ɮaɾ :ʡaɾo~uman ko~u nai mako~utaaj. ʦikato~upaj: ʦiwiɬ~ɮian: o~u nani ʦiwiɬ~ɮiaanaj. mo~unaɾi: maɾo~uɾaŋ: o~u piʡəɬ~ɮo~uan ħan no~u ro~uma a finawɾan. raɬ~ɮiw no~u nijaro~uʡ *raɬ~ɮiw no~u tapo~uwaraj (saranawan)* misiʡajaw to~u rijar o~u panijaro~uʡan nijam . kaətip, o~u ɾo~uto~uk piɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦan. kawaɾi, o~u rijar pifo~utiŋan saj no~u kapaħ. faŋʦaɾ, faŋʦaɾaj ko~upanijaro~uʡan no~u tapo~uwaraj (saranawan). o~u kaħəməkan no~u tajniaj. ʦəʦaj ko~u ʡawas mataħafiko~uɬ~ɮ no~u kakaħo~uŋ i tapo~uwaraj (saranawan). i-jo~u-in-ħaj-jan-na-i-ja-jan, ħo~uj-jan-no~u-i-jo~u-jin, ħo~uj-ja-jan-ħaj-jo~u-jin, o~u-ħi-ja-ħo~uj-jan. səɾaɾ no~u i tijaajħo~u a səɾaɾ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮan i ɾaəno~u. maɾitəŋaj: mato~uʡasaj. mama no~u kapaħ: mamikimaɬ~ɮ, mipapro~u to~u tajar. ʦipo~uʡo~utaj: o~u mipaʦo~ukaj to~u fafo~uj, mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj o~u titi. maɾaʦaʦawaj: o~u mitəfo~uʦaj. mikəɾiɬ~ɮ to~u safa a səɾaɾ. maɾakapaħaj: (ħakəno~u, ʦima ko~u mito~uŋaɾ?) pakaro~uŋaj: i piiɾisinan, miaɾa to~u ɬ~ɮo~uto~uŋ ħananaj a kiɾaŋ, o~u safaŋʦaɾaj a mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ a kiɾaŋ. to~usa a rajaʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamaw. ano~u mimaan ko~u ɾo~umaʡ, miɾitəmo~uħ, miraɬ~ɮo~um, mipanano~um to~u mato~uʡasaj. miʡafataj: miso~upəɬ~ɮ to~u ʡafat (maʡiʦaŋaj a ʡao~ur), ʡaʦam, ato~u maamaanaj a sapito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~u kiɾaŋ. mipaəɬ~ɮiɾ to~u taɾo~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. miasikaj: o~u sakaəmaŋaj a wawa. mamiasik to~u ɾawaʦ ato~u ɾaɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. anini sato~u, masapafaəɾo~uħ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u səɾasəɾaɾ, mikapo~uto~u ko~u fafaħijan i səɾasəɾaɾan. ɾima a miħəʦa ko~u ʦəʦaj tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a səɾaɾ. tajaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ tajaɾ i rijar ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan o~u sapifo~utiŋ i rijar ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan. i tijaħo~u, kaawaj ħo~u no~u so~uka , a ʦiɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujaŋo~ujan ko~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. miaɾa ko~u ʡao~uɾ i ɾo~uto~uk, kəɾaʦən ko~u ʦaʡaŋ ato~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ no~u ʡao~uɾ, təno~urən i nano~um, ta faɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u kəɾiw no~u ʡo~uwaj. matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ʦəʦaj (ano~u to~usa to~u?) a tamɬ~ɮaw to~umirəŋ i fafaəɬ~ɮ. o~u ʦəraj no~u kamo~uraw ko~u sapisakaɬ~ɮo~ut (kaɬ~ɮo~ut, *). mo~uʦəɾaj, kakajaʡaj ko~u matiniaj a ʦəraj, faŋʦaɾ a maɾasakaɬ~ɮo~ut no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan. əɬ~ɮəŋan to~u o~u saranawan a nijaro~uʡ ko~u ʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujanaj, maɾaɾiɬ~ɮaj a mifo~utiŋ tajra i waɾi i kakaʦawan anini. ro~uma ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u simajsiw i nijaro~uʡ. to~uɾo~u ko~u kiwkaj a mapatiɾəŋ, o~u ***, ***, ato~u ****. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipasiŋɾiaj. maɾi*naɬ~ɮ, mifo~utiŋ, mitamaʡ, misijakaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawɾan no~u tapo~uwaraj. o~u mafanaʡaj a misaŋaʡ to~u tamina ko~u faʡinajan no~u tapo~uwaraj. ʦi taminamina ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i tijaħo~u. iraħo~u ko~u ʦisapaɬ~ɮaj a timina a faʡinajan anini. o~u samafana:ʡaj a mifo~utiŋ, mito~uo~ur to~u kako~uħo~uŋ ato~u maamaanaj a fo~utiŋ. mafanaʡ ħaʦa a miʦəɾəm, mipaʦiŋ, miʦəkiw, ato~u miʡao~uwaŋ. misako~uso~uj ko~u mato~uʡasaj i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~uk no~u tapo~uwaraj. ʦiətan i ʡajaw ko~u misako~uso~ujaj. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
